toggle_sprint_display.options.visuals_ty: Select which style is used for the on-screen visuals.
toggle_sprint_display.options.show_sprin: Whether the sprinting state should be shown in the UI.
toggle_sprint_display.options.show_sneak: Whether the sneaking state should be shown in the UI.
toggle_sprint_display.options.show_swimm: Whether the UI should show `Swimming` instead of `Sprinting` when in swimming mode.
toggle_sprint_display.options.anchor.too: Select which screen corner the visuals are positioned relative to.
toggle_sprint_display.options.position_x: Controls the horizontal position of the visuals.
toggle_sprint_display.options.position_y: Controls the vertical position of the visuals.
toggle_sprint_display.options.scale.name: Scale
toggle_sprint_display.options.scale.tool: Controls the size of the visuals.
Shows a small version of the player character on-screen which shows you how others see you.
toggle_sprint_display.options.place_doll: Places the paper doll beneath the other text instead of above.
toggle_sprint_display.options.visuals_ty: Shows the current state and method, e.g. Sprint Held, Sneak Toggled.
Briefly describes your current state, e.g. Sprinting, Sneaking.
Shows emojis representing your current state, takes up the least space.
